title: Iran chief negotiator says Hormuz will be administered by Tehran: state media

snapshot.title: Iran chief negotiator says Hormuz will be administered by Tehran: state media
snapshot.description: TEHRAN: Iran’s chief negotiator Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf said that the Strait of Hormuz will be administered by Tehran, state media reported on Tuesday, following talks pushing to end the US-Israeli war on the Islamic republic. Iran and the United States agreed on Monday to set up communication lines to keep the vital shipping route open and end fighting in Lebanon, mediators
snapshot.author: AFP
snapshot.pageTitle: Iran chief negotiator says Hormuz will be administered by Tehran: state media | Arab News
